inputs.label: US Shoe Size
inputs.businessContext: The US shoe size to convert (e.g., 5-14 for men, 5-12 for women, 1-7 for children). Set to 0 to use foot length instead.

inputs.label: Foot Length (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Foot length in centimeters. Used only when US size is 0. Conversion formula: EU = 1.5 × (footLengthCm + 1.5).

inputs.label: Gender/Age Group
inputs.businessContext: 0: Men (EU ≈ US + 33), 1: Women (EU ≈ US + 31), 2: Children (EU ≈ US + 16). Used only when US size > 0.

inputs.label: User Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: Optional manual adjustment to the final EU size to account for brand variation or personal fit (e.g., +0.5 for a wider fit).
